name: VeChain MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for VeChain blockchain enabling AI agents to search VeChain documentation, query on-chain data, and fetch fee suggestions. VeChain is an enterprise-focused blockchain platform specializing in supply chain management and sustainability tracking. Enables AI agents to interact with VeChain's dual-token ecosystem (VET and VTHO).
use_cases: Querying VeChain blockchain data and transaction history from analytics agents
Searching VeChain developer documentation from development agents
Fetching VTHO fee suggestions for transaction cost estimation from DApp agents
Building supply chain transparency applications with VeChain data from AI agents
not_for: Teams without VeChain use cases — VeChain is enterprise/supply chain focused
best_when: A developer building on VeChain blockchain or an enterprise tracking supply chain data on VeChain wants AI agents to query on-chain data and interact with the VeChain ecosystem.
avoid_when: You use Ethereum, Solana, or other blockchains. VeChain has a specific enterprise/supply chain focus that differentiates it but limits general applicability.

auth.notes: No auth for public blockchain queries. Private key required only for transaction signing — do NOT expose private keys to agents.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — VeChain public node queries are free
pricing.paid_tiers: None for read-only access; VTHO consumed for transactions
pricing.notes: Public VeChain blockchain queries are free. VTHO energy consumed per transaction. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: VeChain node rate limits apply for public nodes

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: If transaction signing is enabled, agents can execute real blockchain transactions
Never expose private keys to agents — use read-only public node queries for analytics
VeChain is enterprise/supply chain focused — validate use case fit before adopting
Community implementation with limited maintenance — verify VeChain API compatibility
VeChain dual-token model (VET/VTHO) adds complexity to transaction cost estimation
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Blockchain transactions are irreversible. NEVER provide private keys to agents. Read-only node queries are safe. Enterprise use cases require careful access control.

security_score_components.security_notes: Blockchain financial risk. Never expose private keys. Read-only queries are safe. Irreversible transactions require human oversight.
